enabled.description: Whether VartaPack is active. Default: true.

showToastOnStartup.description: Show a toast notification on startup. Default: true.

showScreenOnCriticalIssues.description: Automatically show the issues screen when critical issues are found. Default: true.

allowContinueAnyway.description: Allow the player to continue past the issues screen. Default: true.

includeInstalledModsInReport.description: Include the full mod list in support reports. Default: true.

includeExtraModsInReport.description: Include extra (non-pack) mods in support reports. Default: true.

redactUserHomePath.description: Redact the user home directory in reports. Default: true.

redactUsername.description: Redact the OS username in reports. Default: true.

strictMode.description: Elevate extra mods to ERROR and block continue on errors. Default: false.

extraModsSeverity.description: Severity for extra (non-allowed) mods. Default: INFO.

requiredModsSeverity.description: Severity for missing required mods. Default: ERROR.

blockedModsSeverity.description: Severity for blocked mods. Default: ERROR.

recommendedModsSeverity.description: Severity for missing recommended mods. Default: WARNING.
